category_sources: Official fIcy homepage describes it as a stream grabber suite for shell environments.
source_facts.description says fIcy is an Icecast/Shoutcast stream grabber suite.
display_name_sources: Official fIcy homepage names the suite fIcy.
source_facts.homepage uses the canonical fIcy capitalization in the URL and project page title.
docs_sources: Official fIcy homepage includes Usage, Examples, Installation, FAQ, and support information.
repo_sources: Official fIcy homepage says all relevant source/developer information is on GitLab at https://gitlab.com/wavexx/fIcy.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo lookup was required.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists fIcy, fPls, and fResync command-line tools.
